calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion For Attorney'S Fees
Off Calendar Mar-28-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Atty. DANIEL PONIATOWSKI, Esq. of Shartsis Friese LLP (tel: 415-421-6500) for Petitioners.
No other appearances made in this matter.

Hearing Re: PETITIONER SIMONE CHIANG, WILLIAM TSENG, SVSP, LLC's Motion For Attorney'S Fees.

Matter discussed. Counsel Daniel Poniatowski brings to the Court's attention a typo in the tentative. Upon conclusion, the Court adopts its tentative ruling with modifications as follows:

Petitioners' unopposed "motion for attorney's fees" in the amount of $25,530 is granted.

Order signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (302/RBU)

Notice Of Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Dec-19-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER'S SIMONE CHIANG, WILLIAM TSENG, SVSP, LLC unopposed "petition to confirm arbitration award" is granted.

Order and jugment are signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/RBU)
